title: crataegus orientalis var. tournefortii
intro: Crataegus orientalis var. tournefortii, commonly known as the Oriental Hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Crataegus orientalis var. tournefortii include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting liver function, as well as exhibiting anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to promote overall well-being and prevent age-related diseases.
